response.reasoning: Bogdan has 19 years of software engineering experience (2006-2025), exceeding the 15-year minimum, with a BS in Computer Science. Current role at re:cinq explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, directly relevant to AI focus. Strong cloud/infrastructure background across AWS, Kubernetes, and microservices. Demonstrates entrepreneurial experience through founding and maintaining GISCollective since 2016. However, the resume lacks demonstrated deep AI/ML expertise—no ML projects, no AI-powered products, no published thought leadership in AI strategy. No Master's or PhD mentioned, which the role prefers. Positioning is right (cloud, infrastructure, AI), but depth in specialized AI expertise is not yet evident.
strengths: 19 years software engineering experience with strong cloud/infrastructure foundation (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, microservices)
Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing active engagement with core role technologies
Proven founder of GISCollective platform demonstrating product-building and entrepreneurial capability within tech career
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; resume shows Computer Science BS without advanced degree
Limited evidence of recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI-powered products/platforms to point to
Generalist technical background across many domains rather than specialized depth in AI/ML strategy and thought leadership

key_factors.factor: Demonstrated AI product or platform expertise

response.justification: Bogdan meets baseline experience requirements and has relevant cloud/infrastructure and startup experience. Current role places him in AI infrastructure work, which is promising. However, the Principal Engineer position appears to seek someone with recognized, demonstrated expertise in AI/ML with published platforms or products. The resume reads as strong full-stack engineering generalist recently pivoting into AI infrastructure, not as a specialized AI strategist with established thought leadership. This is a "maybe interview" candidate—he has the foundational experience and right current positioning, but needs to clarify depth of AI expertise during conversation.
